reference_answer: The review confirmed that drill kit D-14 was checked out by Rowan Hale on April 12.
The return time is unknown because the checkout tablet lost power before the final scan.
The claim that the drill bit was bent during checkout was retracted.
The replacement request remains pending until the battery inspection is complete.
The overheating rumor is unsupported because no temperature log or witness note backs it.
Revised estimate RE-9 superseded the early repair estimate.
The building-entry log ruled out the claim that the kit left the maker room after 7 p.m.
The supervisor inferred that the kit stayed on the west workbench overnight.
The final storage shelf is unstated.
